# AI Terms Dictionary

> Multilingual AI terminology dictionary with 1000+ terms in 26 languages.

## Key Information

- Website: https://terms.ai-term-hub.com/
- Total terms: 1004
- Languages supported: 26 (English, Chinese, Japanese, Korean, Spanish, German, French, Russian, Arabic, Italian, Dutch, Polish, Portuguese, Turkish, Vietnamese, Thai, Indonesian, Swedish, Czech, Danish, Finnish, Norwegian, Hebrew, Romanian, Hungarian, Greek)
- Search: https://terms.ai-term-hub.com/en/search/
- Sitemap: https://terms.ai-term-hub.com/sitemap.xml

## Important Links

- [English Homepage](https://terms.ai-term-hub.com/en/)
- [Chinese Homepage](https://terms.ai-term-hub.com/zh/)
- [All Terms (English)](https://terms.ai-term-hub.com/en/terms/)
- [Categories](https://terms.ai-term-hub.com/en/categories/)
- [Tags](https://terms.ai-term-hub.com/en/tags/)
- [Search](https://terms.ai-term-hub.com/en/search/)

- [AI Term Hub Main](https://ai-term-hub.com/)
- [AI Benchmarks](https://bench.ai-term-hub.com/)
